title: Charting Clarity: Weekly Visuals Get Boost

topics.title: Charting Improvements
topics.summary: The recent merge of PR #2071 enhances the weekly chart functionality by ensuring that chart buckets are consistently aligned from the range end date. This change eliminates previous logic that adjusted for trailing zero values, leading to more deterministic and reliable chart rendering.

topics.title: Vite+ Alpha Announcement
topics.summary: Vite+ Alpha has been announced as an open-source tool aimed at enhancing JavaScript developer productivity. It offers a unified frontend toolchain, runtime management, and support for caching and monorepos, making it compatible with various frameworks within the Vite ecosystem.
